commands.repair_reason: Missing contributor proof plus a P1 approval-boundary finding make this a human-review blocker, not a repair-lane candidate while the external proof gate is unmet.; Needs attention: The diff changes command execution approval gating and leaves an unquoted $* carrier bypass in strictInlineEval coverage.; Review finding: [P1] Fail closed for unquoted $* carriers — src/infra/command-analysis/risks.ts:141-142 (sha=d4a71a662bed8431e51ca8775e690f3519c12f8b)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds shell positional-carrier traversal to command inline-eval detection and expands command-analysis unit tests for carried `find` and `xargs` forms.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a concrete path: `sh -lc '$0 $*' find . -exec id {} ';'` is accepted as a positional carrier by current allowlist matching while the PR detector returns `null` for `star`. I did not execute a runtime probe because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Missing contributor proof plus a P1 approval-boundary finding make this a human-review blocker, not a repair-lane candidate while the external proof gate is unmet.
